risk_if_not_implemented: Without Authentication & Encryption, sensitive data may be exposed to interception or unauthorized disclosure, resulting in confidentiality breaches.

compensating_control_1.name: Wireless Access Authentication & Encryption
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to protect the confidentiality and integrity of wireless networking technologies by implementing authentication and strong encryption.
compensating_control_1.justification: Wireless Access Authentication & Encryption (CRY-07) provides cryptographic protection that compensates for the absence of Authentication & Encryption (NET-15.1) by ensuring data confidentiality and integrity through alternative technical means. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Wireless Networking
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to control authorized wireless usage and monitor for unauthorized wireless access.
compensating_control_2.justification: Wireless Networking (NET-15) provides network-level access restriction that compensates for the absence of Authentication & Encryption (NET-15.1) by limiting attacker reach and lateral movement opportunities across the environment. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
